I currently have two citations covering system-level technical debt (Sculley et al., 2015) and distribution shift/domain generalization (Al-Emadi et al., 2025). To ensure coverage across all required categories, I need to add a citation that addresses model calibration, overconfidence, and predictive uncertainty. Miscalibration is a critical real-world pitfall where models output high-confidence predictions that are incorrect, leading to dangerous deployment failures.
